overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk along a desert highway toward the futuristic Night City skyline. The camera moves steadily along the roadside through sparse desert vegetation, crosses the multi-lane road through light traffic, and continues into the open desert terrain with distant satellite dishes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder approaching cyberpunk city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the desert highway toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with red curbs stretching toward the city
tall desert tree with spiky leaves characteristic of the badlands
tall black pole with horizontal orange light bar
futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers and construction cranes
small weathered concrete structure with graffiti in the desert scrub

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along the right shoulder of a desert highway. Sparse desert vegetation including joshua trees and dry bushes line the dirt path, while futuristic street lights mark the road's edge. In the distance, the towering skyline of Night City rises against a clear blue sky, with construction cranes visible atop unfinished megastructures.

events.description: silver sedan passes by on the highway, moving in the same direction as the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside as vehicles approach and pass by on the adjacent highway

notable_agents.action: silver van driving along the highway toward the camera's position

entered.detail: massive circular arena building with distinctive architecture on the city outskirts

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder, the camera approaches closer to the city skyline while vehicles begin appearing on the road. A large stadium structure becomes visible on the right side as the abandoned bunker falls behind. The futuristic street lights now line the right side of the path as traffic density increases slightly.

events.description: begins crossing the highway from the right shoulder toward the left side
navigates between passing vehicles including a green car and silver van while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane highway from right to left, timing movement between passing cars

notable_agents.action: green car passing by on the rightmost lane
silver van driving along the center lane

segments.scene_description: The camera initiates a road crossing, moving from the right shoulder across the asphalt lanes toward the left side. Several vehicles including a green car and silver van pass by as the camera navigates the traffic. The highway surface changes from dirt to cracked asphalt and back to dirt as the crossing completes.

events.description: completes road crossing and enters open desert terrain away from the highway

agents.ego_description: walking through the desert terrain away from the highway, heading toward distant satellite dishes

entered.detail: array of large satellite dishes visible on the horizon
tall communication tower with red and white markings

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the highway, the camera moves through open desert terrain with the road now receding to the right. The landscape features scattered joshua trees and dry brush. In the distance, an array of satellite dishes and a tall radio tower become visible against the horizon, while the large stadium structure now appears on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway that transitions from a roadside walk into a crossing of active traffic toward an open wasteland. It begins on a dirt shoulder lined with joshua trees and futuristic street lights, moving steadily toward the towering skyline of Night City and its distant construction cranes. As the camera advances, an abandoned bunker recedes into the distance and a large stadium structure emerges on the right while traffic density on the road increases. The scene then shifts as the camera navigates across the asphalt lanes, passing a green car and a silver van before returning to the dirt terrain on the opposite side. Finally, the road recedes to the right as the camera pushes further into the open desert, where the stadium now sits to the left and an array of satellite dishes and a tall radio tower appear on the horizon.
